run_summary.summary: Big payment progress today! 💸 Both JLab and Whisker Tipalti registrations are NOW COMPLETE — Liz set up payment details on both portals this morning. JLab: account confirmed + payment details updated (apinvoice@jlab.com for future invoices). Whisker: 'Welcome to vendor portal' received + payment details updated — invoice is in accounting's hands and ACH is in motion. Both deals flip to waiting on brand for payment. Also: Liz sent a new outbound pitch to Black Diamond Coatings today for a backyard firepit patio collab — created that card so you can track it.

suggestions.message: Payment is in motion via Tipalti ACH — I'd set a calendar reminder for May 27 to follow up if nothing's arrived. Kenny's closing note to Cheyenne about loving the Litter Robot was a great touch. If Whisker ever wants more content, they'll definitely remember it 🐱

Tipalti is all set — JLab should be able to process your payment now. Follow up around May 27 if you haven't heard anything. And note for next time: JLab invoices go to apinvoice@jlab.com (pdf/jpg/png only), not to a person.

Liz pitched Lauren Jankauskas at Black Diamond Coatings for the backyard firepit patio project — great seasonal angle! No response yet. If you don't hear back by Thursday (May 1), a quick follow-up email could help move it along.

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Tipalti registration complete — account confirmed, payment details updated (contact + banking info submitted). JLab now processes payment. Future invoices to apinvoice@jlab.com (pdf/jpg/png only). Portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab. JLab accounting contact: ap@jlabaudio.com.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: JLab Tipalti registration completed — account confirmed + payment details set up. Waiting on JLab to process payment.

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Whisker Tipalti registration complete — 'Welcome to vendor portal' received, payment details (ACH) updated. Cheyenne confirmed invoice submitted to Whisker Accounting. Future invoices to APInvoices@whisker.com (not monitored — send statements/comms to Accounting@whisker.com). Portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/Whisker.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Cheyenne submitted invoice to Whisker Accounting. Tipalti ACH registration complete. Waiting on $2,000 payment.

deals.next_action: Wait for Lauren at Black Diamond Coatings to respond to pitch
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Lauren Jankauskas (lauren.jankauskas@blackdiamondcoatings.com). Pitching a backyard firepit patio makeover collab — raised paver patio with pea gravel, designated fire pit + Adirondack chair space. Wants to feature Black Diamond's Mulch Glue and hardscape products as the solution for a clean, low-maintenance finish. Media kit attached. No rate or deliverables discussed yet.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Liz sent outbound pitch for backyard firepit patio project featuring Mulch Glue + hardscape products. Awaiting response.
